name: Turkish Draughts
author: AGP port (Dama / Turkish draughts)
description: Turkish Draughts (Dama) on all 64 squares of an 8x8 board. Men move and capture orthogonally (forward or sideways, never diagonal or backward); flying kings move and capture any distance along ranks and files. Mandatory maximum capture, with captured pieces removed immediately. Capture every enemy piece or leave the opponent with no move.
